mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 6.5 percent, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress consumer spending and corporate revenue growth, leading to negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the unemployment threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in industrial production and housing starts indicates a broad-based demand shock that outpaces supply adjustments, triggering a risk-off repricing in equities over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint decline in INDPRO and HOUST does not predict negative 60-day forward returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth exceeding 3.0 percent annually sustains corporate profit margins and equity risk premiums, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter, provided inflation remains anchored below 3.0 percent.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns turn negative in more than 50 percent of quarters where GDP growth exceeds 3.0 percent while CPI remains below 3.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: A CPI reading above 240 forces the Federal Reserve to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and depressing forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in more than 60 percent of instances where CPIAUCSL breaches the 240 threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects robust economic momentum that supports corporate earnings revisions, generating positive equity returns over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS month-over-month changes against 5-day forward SPX returns falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment rises concurrently with declining real personal savings, it indicates a liquidity-driven consumption collapse that rapidly deteriorates equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint distribution of rising UNRATE and falling RSAFS fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns with a t-statistic exceeding 1.96.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 100 signals a supply-demand imbalance that triggers inventory drawdowns and margin compression, leading to negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns are not significantly negative (p > 0.05) when INDPRO remains below 100 for consecutive months.
